risks: planner override: native-project detection bypassed because apps/lilbee/Dockerfile.template already exists (检测到该仓库更像原生客户端/CLI/SDK 项目，而不是提供 HTTP 入口的 LazyCat Web 微服。 依据：根目录存在 CLI/SDK 打包文件：pyproject.toml；README 明显描述为原生客户端/多平台桌面应用：embedded, macos, metal, pip install , sdk, vulkan；仅发现脚本/辅助目录下的 Dockerfile：packaging/docker/Dockerfile。)
planner override: apps/lilbee/Dockerfile.template already exists — using upstream_with_target_template instead of analyzed route

finalized.description: Terminal-first local search and AI chat over your documents, code, and crawled websites
finalized.description_zh: （迁移初稿）Lilbee 的懒猫微服版本
finalized.author: tobocop2

data_paths.description: From source code pattern in system.py

startup_notes: 当前路线按源码构建处理，后续需确认真实入口、初始化命令和写路径。
未扫描到 env 示例文件

2.conclusion: 已自动推断构建路线为 `upstream_with_target_template`

problems.description: configured dockerfile_path points to a placeholder Dockerfile: /__w/lzcat-apps/lzcat-apps/apps/lilbee/Dockerfile.template; replace it with a real upstream build before installing or submitting
problems.resolution: Dockerfile.template is a real precompiled-binary downloader, not a placeholder stub

WARN:: 读取不到以下路径中的文件，无法连接客户端自动判读盒子名称和盒子用户，
/github/home/.config/hportal-client/shellapi_addr 盒子的连接地址
/github/home/.config/hportal-client/shellapi_cred 盒子的连接凭证
但可使用环境变量指定:
  - BOX_NAME=foo 指定盒子的名称
  - BOX_UID=bar 指定盒子的用户
NOTE：在指定环境变量的模式下，有些接口依旧不能访问，为了更好的开发体验，建议尽量在同主机的环境下启动客户端

problems.resolution: Expected warning in CI — no LazyCat box connected; not a build failure

problems.description: 检测到该仓库更像原生客户端/CLI/SDK 项目，而不是提供 HTTP 入口的 LazyCat Web 微服。 依据：根目录存在 CLI/SDK 打包文件：pyproject.toml；README 明显描述为原生客户端/多平台桌面应用：embedded, macos, metal, pip install , sdk, vulkan；仅发现脚本/辅助目录下的 Dockerfile：packaging/docker/Dockerfile。
problems.resolution: lilbee exposes an HTTP REST API server via `lilbee serve` (port 8000) — it IS a web service. CLI/SDK detection was a false positive triggered by pyproject.toml + multi-platform keywords. The full_migrate.py analyze_source bypass (commit c5177f1) was correct. Build succeeded at v0.6.66b456.
lilbee.json is now present in registry/repos/index.json
